skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: AI-powered video creation agent that transforms user requests into short videos (5-120 seconds). Handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music automatically.
skill.summary: Professional AI video production agent supporting product ads, social content, brand videos, and explainers with multi-language support.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate AI video production integration tool. Static analysis flagged 534 patterns across 13 files, but most are false positives. The scripts use standard bash patterns (command substitution, config file access) for legitimate purposes: API integration with pexo.ai, file uploads, and project management. No malicious intent detected. The critical finding about 'Windows SAM database' is a false positive - the referenced line discusses language settings, not credential access. Risk factors are expected for an API client that reads configuration, makes network requests, and handles file uploads.

low_findings.title: External API Configuration Required
low_findings.description: The skill requires users to configure API credentials in ~/.pexo/config file. This is standard for API clients but users must trust the skill author.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard API client pattern - credentials stored in dedicated config file, not hardcoded in scripts

low_findings.title: Network Requests to External Service
low_findings.description: Scripts make HTTPS requests to pexo.ai API. All network traffic goes to a single external domain which is the intended service provider.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Network calls use hardcoded PEXO_BASE_URL pointing to legitimate service endpoint, no dynamic URL construction

low_findings.title: File Upload Capability
low_findings.description: The pexo-upload.sh script uploads user files to external servers. Files are sent to pexo.ai infrastructure for video processing.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Upload functionality is core to the skill's purpose - video creation requires sending media files to processing service

content.user_title: Create AI-powered videos from text descriptions
content.value_statement: Transform your video ideas into professional short-form content without manual editing. This skill connects to Pexo's AI video agent that handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music automatically.
actual_capabilities: Creates short videos (5-120 seconds) from text descriptions
Supports multiple video types: product ads, social content, brand videos, explainers
Handles user-uploaded images, videos, and audio as reference materials
Provides preview options for users to select preferred versions
Relays bidirectional communication between user and Pexo's AI video agent
limitations: Cannot crawl web URLs - users must download files locally before uploading
Video production takes 15-20 minutes for short videos, longer for complex content
Requires valid Pexo API key and credits balance
Does not support real-time video editing - changes require new production cycles

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Videos
use_cases.description: Create promotional videos for online store products by uploading product photos and describing the desired style.

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Creation
use_cases.description: Generate engaging short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts from simple text prompts.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

use_cases.title: Internal Training and Explainer Videos
use_cases.description: Produce training materials and process explanation videos by describing the topic and providing any relevant screenshots or documents.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Product Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second product video for running shoes. Show the shoes from different angles with dynamic motion shots. Background should be urban running trails.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick product showcase for e-commerce listing

prompt_templates.title: Social Media Ad with Upload
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a 15-second Instagram story ad using this product photo. Add energetic music and text overlays highlighting key features.
prompt_templates.scenario: Social media advertising with custom imagery

prompt_templates.title: Brand Story Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 60-second brand story video. Start with problem statement, introduce our solution, show happy customers using the product, end with call-to-action.
prompt_templates.scenario: Comprehensive brand narrative for website or presentations

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Asset Product Launch
prompt_templates.prompt: Produce a 45-second product launch video using these assets: hero product shot, lifestyle photos, logo file. Style should match Apple's minimalist aesthetic with smooth transitions.
prompt_templates.scenario: Professional product launch with multiple reference materials

output_examples.input: Create a 20-second video of a cat playing with yarn balls
output_examples.output: Video delivered in 18 minutes with download URL and project page link. Preview showed 3 style options before final selection.

output_examples.input: Product video for handmade ceramic mugs with 5 product photos
output_examples.output: 45-second promotional video featuring rotating product shots, lifestyle usage scenes, and pricing overlay. Delivered in 16:9 and 9:16 formats.

best_practices: Copy user messages exactly when relaying to Pexo - do not add creative interpretations or details the user did not provide
Always wrap uploaded asset IDs in proper tags like <original-image>asset_id</original-image> when sending to Pexo
Poll status every 60 seconds during WAIT state and provide users with project link for tracking progress
anti_patterns: Do not call pexo-chat.sh during WAIT state - this triggers duplicate video production and wasted credits
Never truncate video URLs when delivering to users - include full URL with all query parameters
Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style details to user requests unless explicitly specified by the user

faq.question: What video formats and lengths does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill creates videos between 5-120 seconds in three aspect ratios: 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (portrait), and 1:1 (square). Supported output formats include MP4 for video delivery.

faq.question: How long does video production take?
faq.answer: Typical production time is 15-20 minutes for a short video (15-30 seconds). Complex or longer videos may take additional time. The skill polls for status and provides progress updates.

faq.question: Can I upload images or audio to include in the video?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upload images (jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic), videos (mp4, mov, avi), and audio files (mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac). Use the pexo-upload.sh script to upload files before referencing them in your request.

faq.question: What happens if I run out of credits?
faq.answer: If credits are insufficient, the skill will notify you with a credit error message. You can purchase additional credits at https://pexo.ai/home by clicking Credits in the top-right corner.

faq.question: Can I request revisions to a completed video?
faq.answer: Yes, use the same project_id and send feedback via pexo-chat.sh with your revision requests. The skill will process revisions using the existing project context.

faq.question: Does this skill work with video URLs from the web?
faq.answer: No, the skill cannot crawl web URLs directly. You must download web-hosted files to your local system first, then upload them using pexo-upload.sh.
